input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.4.2.8 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.4.2.8
            TITLE: the apps signals must be sent directly to a controller using an analogue signal or via a digital

            CONTENT:
            rule T.4.2.8: The APPS signals must be sent directly to a controller using an analogue signal or via a digital
T.4.2.8 The APPS signals must be sent directly to a controller using an analogue signal or via a digital 
data transmission bus such as CAN or FlexRay.

final_answer: The APPS signals must be sent directly to a controller using an analogue signal or via a digital data transmission bus such as CAN or FlexRay.
